backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the chat application, defining types and state for messages, chatrooms, user profiles, reactions, and active users, with functions for access control, CRUD operations on chatrooms/messages, reactions, flagging, and user profile management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two UI features (image/GIF button popover inside chat input, and voice/send button swap behavior) to their implementing file `MessageInput.tsx` with associated component dependencies and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of components, pages, hooks, and configuration files in the React frontend.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app with cache-busting meta tags, a `#root` mount div, and a versioned module script tag pointing to `main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with lobby, chatroom, and admin routes, conditionally rendering the Header and Footer (both hidden on admin pages, Footer also hidden on chatroom pages).
frontend/src/components/AvatarPickerDial: Dialog component allowing users to upload a custom image, remove their avatar, or select a GIF from Giphy (with debounced search and trending fallback) as their profile avatar.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Main chat interface component that renders a collapsible header, pinned video, scrollable filtered message list with auto-scroll and scroll-to-target-message support, reply context, and the message input.
frontend/src/components/ChatroomCard.tsx: Renders a card for a chatroom with thumbnail previews for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter media, displaying topic, category, live status, and participant counts.
frontend/src/components/CreateChatroomDi: Modal dialog for creating a new chatroom with fields for topic, description, category, and media (image upload, video URL, or Twitter post), including Twitter embed preview support.
frontend/src/components/ExternalLinkDisc: Dialog that warns users before navigating to an external URL, displaying the target link and offering Cancel or Continue actions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with the Chattr logo, back-to-lobby navigation when inside a chatroom, inline username editing with alphanumeric validation, and an avatar picker.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: No-op placeholder component that renders nothing, explicitly noting that authentication is not used in this app.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders an individual chat message with support for reactions, pinning, replies, media embeds (YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, GIFs), URL detection, voice message playback, and message reporting.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Chat message input component supporting text, image uploads, Giphy GIF search, voice recording, and auto-detection of YouTube/Twitch/Twitter URLs pasted into the message field.
frontend/src/components/PinnedVideo.tsx: Renders a pinned YouTube or Twitch video as an embedded iframe within a chatroom, with an unpin button that calls the useUnpinVideo mutation.
frontend/src/components/VoiceMessagePlay: A voice message playback component with play/pause controls, a seekable slider, and a randomly generated waveform visualization; pauses other audio elements when playing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all non-actor queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Generic hook that debounces a value by a configurable delay (default 300ms) using setTimeout.
frontend/src/hooks/useForceFreshChatroom: Hook that purges stale or empty cached chatroom data and forces a fresh refetch of the chatrooms query once the ICP actor becomes ready, exposing an isRecovering flag for loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, logout, identity, status) via a React context provider backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file covering chatroom listing/search/category queries, message queries, and mutations for sending messages, reactions, image uploads, and video pinning/unpinning, with localStorage-based username and avatar management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens), and includes mobile-specific input styles and custom voice message range input styling.
frontend/src/lib/config.ts: Exports frontend configuration constants including the Giphy API key and result limit.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Exports a single utility function `formatCompactNumber` that formats numbers into compact human-readable strings (k, M, B suffixes).
frontend/src/lib/giphy.ts: Provides functions to search Giphy and fetch trending GIFs via the Giphy API, returning normalized GIF objects with preview and original URLs.
frontend/src/lib/html2canvasLoader.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a lazy-loader for the html2canvas library.
frontend/src/lib/imageCompression.ts: Client-side image compression utility that resizes and recompresses image files using an HTML canvas, with configurable max dimensions, quality, and progress callback.
frontend/src/lib/twitterEmbedRenderer.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter embed rendering utility.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreview.ts: Fetches Twitter oEmbed JSON to extract safe preview fields (author, text, image) with in-flight deduplication and localStorage caching.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreviewCac: localStorage cache layer for Twitter oEmbed preview data, supporting versioned entries with a 7-day expiration and cache key derivation from tweet IDs.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnail.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail fetching utility.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnailCache.t: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail caching utility.
frontend/src/lib/videoUtils.ts: Utility functions for extracting video/post IDs and generating thumbnail/embed URLs for YouTube, Twitch (clips, VODs, live), and Twitter/X.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeleteChatroomsP: Password-protected admin moderation page that lists chatrooms with flagged message counts, supports filtering/searching, and allows admins to delete chatrooms via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ChatroomPage.tsx: Page component that loads a specific chatroom by ID, increments its view count on load, handles loading/error states, and renders the ChatArea component with optional deep-link target message support.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Main lobby page displaying all chatrooms with client-side search, category filtering, and algorithmic sorting (live rooms first, then by view count and recency), plus a dialog to create new chatrooms.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for 'Chattr' tracking existing features and pending feature requests related to moving the image/GIF button inside the chat input and swapping the send/voice button based on input focus state.
